creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text: I'm guessing you didn't have the ETCSYMLINK option on for ca_root_nss, but nowadays it's on by default (since June 2015 r388657).  I'm puzzled as to how it happened to you without you deliberately turning it off, but I think this is probably a case of user error.  I don't see a problem with the docs now.
